display_name: Docker Supply Chain — Compromised Image Registry
procedure_steps: BEFORE pulling any Docker image, check the advisory registry for known compromised images.
If the image+tag matches a compromised entry, BLOCK the pull and warn the agent.
If the image is listed but the tag is safe, ALLOW but note the advisory.
If the image is not listed, ALLOW normally.
ALWAYS prefer pinning images by SHA256 digest over mutable tags.
restrictions: NEVER pull a compromised image tag
ALWAYS check before docker pull, docker compose pull, docker compose up --build
If a compromised image is already running, alert the operator immediately
notes: Compromised Docker image registry. Advisory file at ~/.claude/hooks/docker-advisories.json.
